case_number: Civil Judge-X Karachi East in Civil Suit No.2701 of 2023

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1370 of 2025 (Hassan Ali v. Tehseen Furqan Siddiqui) ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders on CMA No.1249/2026 23.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Asif Bhatti, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Sohail Hassan, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Kamran, AAG --------- This petition is directed against the order dated 22.10.2025 passed by learned Senior Civil Judge-X Karachi East in Civil Suit No.2701 of 2023 and the order dated 25.11.2025 passed by Vth Additional District & Sessions Judge Karachi East in Civil Revision No.272/2025 (re-Hassan Ali v. Tehseen Furqan Siddique & others), whereby the trial Court had passed order under Order 40 Rule 1 CPC regarding attachment of the property by appointing Nazir of the Court as receiver. 2. When confronted, that the order for attachment of the property was against the Defendant No.1 namely Muhammad Ashraf and said person has not challenged the attachment proceedings, how the locus standi in favour of the present petitioner Hassan Ali has been created, learned counsel for the petitioner failed to satisfy the Court on the maintainability of this petition, however, contends that since the petitioner is in possession of the property- in-question, therefore, attachment order will affect his rights. 3. Since, no order has been passed against the petitioner and his application under Order I Rule 10 CPC seeking impleadment as party in the proceedings is to yet to be decided by the Court below, therefore, this petition being without merit is dismissed with no order as to costs.

Since, no order has been passed against the petitioner and his application under Order I Rule 10 CPC seeking impleadment as party in the proceedings is to yet to be decided by the Court below, therefore, this petition being without merit is dismissed with no order as to costs. JUDGE Nadir*
